import { getEntityCache, type GoblEntityData } from "gobl-utils-ts";
import ClientBase from "./base/ClientBase";

export default class Client extends ClientBase {
	constructor(data?: GoblEntityData) {
		super(data, "Client", Client.PREFIX, [...Client.COLUMNS]);
	}

	public static fromCache(key: string): Client | undefined {
		const cache = getEntityCache<Client>("Client");
		return cache && cache.get(key);
	}

	//====================================================
	//=	Your custom implementation goes here
	//====================================================
}
